cases.title: TS-34: Student receives paginated read-only personal attendance history with required fields
preconditions: Authenticated Student A session with enrollment history across at least two Closed sessions
Student B has attendance records in the same class-subject sessions
Student A has mixed statuses (Present with checkedInAt, Absent, Excused) across Closed sessions
At least 25 history rows exist for Student A to exercise cursor-based pagination
steps: GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history?limit=20 using Student A session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert response items array length ≤ 20 and every item belongs to Student A (no Student B institutionalId or displayName)
Assert each item includes sessionDate (scheduled_start), subject name or subjectId, status (Present, Absent, or Excused), and checkedInAt populated only when status is Present
Follow nextCursor with second GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history?limit=20&cursor={nextCursor} and assert remaining own records returned without peer rows
Assert totalCount reflects Student A Closed-session attendance count only per FR-14 and AC-14a
cases.expected: FR-14 satisfied: paginated read-only list shows only own records with session date, subject, status, and check-in time when applicable per testing-plan TS-34 and listing UX §0 for /history

cases.title: AttendanceService.getStudentHistory returns only authenticated student records via real DB transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with Closed sessions and attendance_records for Student A and Student B in shared enrollments
AttendanceService wired per attendance module §2.5 with roster and session read models
Student A has 30 Closed-session attendance rows; Student B has distinct rows in overlapping sessions
steps: Invoke AttendanceService.getStudentHistory(studentAId, { limit: 20 })
Assert returned page contains exactly 20 items and all rows have student_id matching studentAId at repository layer
Assert pagination envelope includes items, nextCursor (non-null when more rows exist), and totalCount equal to Student A row count
Invoke getStudentHistory(studentAId, { limit: 20, cursor: nextCursor }) and assert second page rows are disjoint from first page
Query attendance_records directly and assert no Student B session rows appear in either page
Verify SQL join filters ar.student_id = $authenticated_student_id and s.status = Closed per database design §8.4
Assert getStudentHistory executes as a single SELECT with JOINs (attendance_records, sessions, subjects) per database design §8.4 — no per-row subject or session fan-out (N+1)
cases.expected: Module-integration boundary: AttendanceService.getStudentHistory returns self-scoped paginated history only via single joined query per attendance module §2.5 and database design §8.4

cases.title: GET /attendance/me/history returns 200 JSON list envelope with history item fields
preconditions: Authenticated Student session with at least one Closed session attendance record
Known Present record includes checkedInAt timestamp
steps: Send GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history?limit=20 with Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains items array, nextCursor, and totalCount per API design §10.1 success list envelope
Assert each item in items includes subject identifier or name, sessionDate (ISO 8601), status enum (Present, Absent, or Excused), and checkedInAt when status is Present
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 success contract for GET /attendance/me/history per API design §7.3 and §10.1; history DTO fields match FR-14 outputs

cases.title: Student history cursor pagination respects limit, totalCount, and page boundaries
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with 45 Closed-session attendance rows for Student A ordered by scheduled_start DESC
AttendanceService.getStudentHistory callable with cursor and limit parameters
steps: Invoke getStudentHistory(studentAId, { limit: 20 }) and capture items, nextCursor, totalCount
Assert items.length === 20, totalCount === 45, and nextCursor is non-null
Invoke getStudentHistory(studentAId, { limit: 20, cursor: nextCursor }) and assert items.length === 20
Invoke getStudentHistory(studentAId, { limit: 20, cursor: secondPageCursor }) and assert items.length === 5 (final page)
Assert nextCursor is null on final page and union of all pages equals 45 unique session attendance rows
Assert no duplicate items across pages and ordering remains session date descending per 14-listing-pages-search-filter-sort.md §5.2 and §6 (20 per fetch on /history)
cases.expected: Pagination invariant: page size, totalCount, cursor continuity, and final-page boundary behave correctly for student history per FR-14 and 14-listing-pages-search-filter-sort.md §6 (20 per fetch on /history)

cases.title: Student denied GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance peer roster with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student A session (attendance:read self only; no session roster scope per roles-permissions §2.2)
Closed session with attendance records for Student A and multiple peer students
Known sessionId for that Closed session
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance using Student A session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden
Assert response message Bạn không có quyền thực hiện thao tác này per error-handling §2.3
Assert response body contains no records array, peer student names, institutionalIds, or attendance statuses
Verify Student A can still GET /attendance/me/history and receive only own rows
cases.expected: FR-14 isolation: student cannot view other students' records via session roster API; no peer data exposed per AC-14b

cases.title: Student denied GET /reports/summary institution-wide aggregates with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session with attendance history records
Student lacks report:read per roles-permissions §2.3 (students never receive report:read)
Institution-wide attendance data exists for multiple cohorts
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert errorCode Forbidden or ReportAccessDenied
Assert localized Vietnamese permission message per error-handling §2.3
Assert response body contains no student roster, summary counts, or cross-cohort aggregate data
Verify Student can access only GET /attendance/me/history for self-scoped personal history
cases.expected: FR-14 satisfied: student cannot view institution-wide aggregates; only self-scoped personal history via attendance:read (self)

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET /attendance/me/history returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: No valid session cookie or bearer token
Attendance history data exists in system
steps: GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history without authentication headers
Assert HTTP status 401 Unauthorized
Assert errorCode Unauthenticated
Assert message Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục per BR-06 and error-handling §4.1
Assert response contains no attendance items or peer data
cases.expected: Personal history requires authenticated student session; unauthenticated callers denied with no data leak per FR-14 inputs

cases.title: /history shows paginated card list with StatusBadge and load-more per listing §0
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport (StudentLayout)
At least 25 Closed-session attendance records with mixed Present, Absent, and Excused statuses
Student bottom nav includes Lịch sử link to /history per page-list §3.2
TableToolbar visible on /history per page-list §3.2 and 14-listing §0
steps: Navigate to /history
Wait for AttendanceHistoryList to load and assert **3** skeleton cards during loading per ui-states §5, then transitions to data rows
Verify each card row displays subject name, session date (vi-VN formatted), StatusBadge with correct variant for Present/Absent/Excused, and check-in time only on Present rows
Verify first page shows up to 20 rows per 14-listing-pages-search-filter-sort.md §6 cursor/load-more page size
Click Tải thêm (load more) and verify inline spinner on button during fetch per ui-states §5
Verify additional rows append without duplicating first page
When all records loaded verify Tải thêm is hidden and Đã hiển thị tất cả is shown per ui-states §5
Verify rows sorted by session date descending by default and list is read-only (no edit controls) per 14-listing §5.2 and FR-14
cases.expected: FR-14 browser journey: /history paginated read-only list with status badges and load-more per listing §0, page-list §3.2, ui-states §5, and event-specific-components §2.4

cases.title: Student /history empty state when no Closed sessions exist
preconditions: Authenticated Student with enrollments but no Closed-session attendance records yet
Student has not completed any workshop session to Closed state
TableToolbar visible on /history per page-list §3.2
steps: Navigate to /history
Wait for API GET /attendance/me/history to complete
Verify EmptyState displays message Chưa có buổi học nào per ui-states §5 and 14-listing §7
Verify no StatusBadge or attendance cards rendered
Verify load-more control hidden or disabled when items array is empty
cases.expected: Browser empty state for student with no history records; no erroneous peer or placeholder data shown

cases.title: GET /attendance/me/history with limit=201 returns 400 InvalidPagination
preconditions: Authenticated Student session
Validation-rules VAL-07 enforces limit 1–200 (default 50) per API design §1
steps: GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history?limit=201 using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 400 Bad Request
Assert response errorCode InvalidPagination
Assert Vietnamese message Tham số phân trang không hợp lệ per error-handling §4.3
Assert response contains no items array or attendance data in error envelope
cases.expected: Pagination boundary enforced: limit above max 200 rejected with InvalidPagination; no history data leaked on invalid request

cases.title: GET /attendance/me/history with malformed cursor returns 400 InvalidPagination
preconditions: Authenticated Student session
Validation-rules VAL-08 rejects malformed opaque cursor per error-handling §4.3
steps: GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history?cursor=not-a-valid-cursor using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 Bad Request
Assert response errorCode InvalidPagination
Assert no partial attendance items returned in error body
cases.expected: Malformed cursor boundary rejected with InvalidPagination per validation-rules VAL-08; no partial history data exposed

cases.title: Flow A: Student views personal history after successful workshop check-in and session close
preconditions: Flow A completed through step 6: roster seeded, session created with GPS, opened, Student A checked in Present, instructor closed session
Student A authenticated with session cookie
steps: GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history using Student A session after session Closed
Assert HTTP 200 and items include the workshop session row
Assert that row shows status Present, matching subject, sessionDate equal to scheduled_start, and checkedInAt populated
Navigate to /history in browser and verify same session appears with Present StatusBadge and check-in time
Confirm history reflects check-in outcome without exposing other students' records
cases.expected: Flow A lifecycle includes student personal history visibility after check-in and close per WF-05 sub-flow and testing-plan §6

cases.title: GET /attendance/me/history supports subjectId, date range, q, and status filters scoped to self
preconditions: Authenticated Student A with Closed sessions in SWE-101 (June 2026) and SWE-102 (July 2026)
Mixed Present, Absent, and Excused records in each subject
steps: GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history?subjectId={swe101Id}&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using Student A session
Assert HTTP 200 and all items reference SWE-101 subject with sessionDate within from/to inclusive
Assert no SWE-102 session rows appear in filtered result
GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history?q=SWE-101&status=Present using Student A session
Assert HTTP 200 and all items show status Present with subject matching q token; no peer student data
GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history without filters and assert totalCount ≥ filtered totalCount
Assert all filtered items remain Student A records only per self-scope invariant
cases.expected: History endpoint filters (subjectId, from, to, q, status) apply within self-scoped result set per API design §7.3 and 14-listing-pages-search-filter-sort.md §12

cases.title: Student PATCH on peer attendance recordId returns 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student A session
Known attendance recordId belonging to Student B in a Closed session
Student A lacks attendance:write per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:peerRecordId with body { "status": "Present", "note": "Unauthorized edit" } using Student A session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert errorCode Forbidden
Assert no attendance_records row updated for peerRecordId
Query attendance_records for peerRecordId and assert status unchanged
Assert response contains no peer student profile or roster data beyond denial envelope
cases.expected: FR-14 read-only guarantee: student cannot mutate another student's attendance record; peer data not exposed per AC-14b

cases.title: /history TableToolbar subject search filters card list per 14-listing §3.2
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with Closed-session records in SWE-101 and SWE-102
TableToolbar search input visible with placeholder Tìm theo môn học… per 14-listing §3.2
steps: Navigate to /history and wait for populated card list
Type SWE-101 (or partial subject name) into TableToolbar search input
Wait for debounced filter (300 ms per 14-listing §3.1) and verify only SWE-101 rows remain visible
Assert no SWE-102 cards shown and all visible rows remain self-scoped attendance records
Click × clear control in search input and verify full history list restores
Verify search state encoded in URL ?q= when applicable per 14-listing §12
cases.expected: FR-14 listing compliance: /history subject search filters results within self-scoped history per 14-listing §0 and §3.2

cases.title: AttendanceService.getStudentHistory applies status and text search filters within self-scoped history while preserving pagination invariants
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with Closed-session attendance_records for Student A across multiple subjects and statuses (Present, Absent, Excused)
At least 30 records for Student A, including 10 Present rows in subject SWE-101 whose subject name/code contains a common token (e.g. SWE)
AttendanceService.getStudentHistory supports filter arguments { status, q, limit, cursor } mapped to /history search and status Select per 14-listing-pages-search-filter-sort.md §3.2 and §4.3.1
steps: Invoke AttendanceService.getStudentHistory(studentAId, { status: "Present", limit: 20 }) and assert all returned rows have status Present and student_id = studentAId

Invoke AttendanceService.getStudentHistory(studentAId, { q: "SWE", limit: 20 }) and assert all returned rows have subjects whose code or name fuzzy-matches the query while still being scoped to studentAId
Invoke AttendanceService.getStudentHistory(studentAId, { status: "Excused", q: "SWE", limit: 20 }) and assert intersection of filters is applied (only Excused SWE rows for Student A are returned)

For at least one filtered invocation with >20 matching rows, follow nextCursor into a second page and assert no duplicates across pages, totalCount equals count of matching Student A rows in attendance_records, and ordering is consistent with sessionDate DESC
Verify that the same filter combinations applied directly at repository/query level would not surface any other student's records even if they share the same subject or name tokens
cases.expected: Module-integration test proves AttendanceService.getStudentHistory enforces self-scope while correctly applying status and text search filters and preserving pagination invariants required by /history listing UX and AC-14a

cases.title: /history status Select filter shows only matching StatusBadge rows
preconditions: Authenticated Student with mixed Present, Absent, and Excused Closed-session records
TableToolbar status Select visible with options Tất cả / Có mặt / Vắng / Có phép per 14-listing §4.3.1
steps: Navigate to /history and wait for populated card list
Select Có mặt in Trạng thái filter
Verify every visible card shows Present StatusBadge variant only
Select Vắng and verify only Absent StatusBadge rows remain
Select Có phép and verify only Excused StatusBadge rows remain
Reset filter to Tất cả and verify all status variants return
Assert filter applies on change without separate Apply button per 14-listing §4.1 toolbar pattern
cases.expected: FR-14 listing compliance: /history status filter narrows self-scoped card list per 14-listing §0 and §4.3.1

cases.title: /history sort control reorders cards by date, subject, or status
preconditions: Authenticated Student with at least six Closed-session records spanning multiple subjects and dates
Sort control available per 14-listing §5.2 (Date, Môn, Trạng thái) on /history mobile layout
steps: Navigate to /history and wait for populated card list
Verify default order is session date descending per 14-listing §5.2
Change sort to Môn ascending and verify subject names appear in locale-aware ascending order
Change sort to Trạng thái and verify cards group or order by status per sortable column spec
Change sort back to Date descending and verify newest session appears first
Assert sort preference does not expose peer records and list remains read-only
cases.expected: FR-14 listing compliance: /history sort variants work on self-scoped card list per 14-listing §0 and §5.2

cases.title: /history search or filter with no matches shows Không tìm thấy kết quả empty state
preconditions: Authenticated Student with at least one Closed-session attendance record
TableToolbar search and status filter available on /history
steps: Navigate to /history and wait for populated card list
Enter non-matching search text (e.g. ZZZ-NOMATCH) in subject search input
Verify no-result message Không tìm thấy kết quả displayed per 14-listing §7
Verify Xóa bộ lọc CTA clears search and restores populated list
Apply status filter Có phép when student has no Excused records and verify same no-results state with clear-filter CTA
cases.expected: Search/filter no-match state shows localized empty message and clear-filter action without peer data per 14-listing §7
